name: planning-with-files
description: Manus-style file-based planning system using three persistent markdown files (task_plan.md, findings.md, progress.md) to maintain AI task state across context resets and sessions. Compatible with 12+ AI IDEs.
review: Standout skill with 15k+ stars, zero external dependencies, self-documented security risks, active maintenance, and a genuinely novel session-recovery mechanism using three persistent markdown files. Ships pre-configured for 12+ AI IDEs including Cursor, Codex, Continue, and Gemini.

drax_results.notes: init-session.sh, check-complete.sh, session-catchup.py all verified. All 5 SKILL.md file links resolve.
